title: Example Evidence-Traceable Manuscript Package
chinese_source_summary: 这是一个用于演示完整核验工作流的投稿包，不代表真实投稿。
english_abstract: This example demonstrates an evidence-traceable manuscript workflow rather than reporting a new scientific study. It records manuscript provenance, maps each claim to an evidence identifier, verifies bibliographic metadata against scholarly indexes, captures journal-policy excerpts from an official page, and checks whether sentences promised in a reviewer response are present in the revised manuscript. The package is intentionally small so maintainers can run it as an integration example. Passing the workflow confirms structural consistency and retrieval success only; it does not establish scientific validity, journal compliance, or acceptance readiness for a real submission.

claims.text: The cited Nature article is titled 'Highly accurate protein structure prediction with AlphaFold'.

evidence.summary: Crossref/OpenAlex metadata lookup generated by the workflow.

references.title: Highly accurate protein structure prediction with AlphaFold

cover_letter: Dear Editor, this synthetic package is provided only to exercise the paper-skill verification workflow.
highlights: Two-source DOI metadata agreement for the cited example.

declarations.data_availability: No research dataset is associated with this synthetic example.
